$comment: Public roadmap — projects/ideas Diogo plans to build but has NOT started yet (no GitHub repo). The SECOND hand-edited file (alongside overrides.json); see docs/DECISIONS.md#D11. Pure curation: there is no GitHub source to derive from, so this file IS the canonical source — validated by `npm run sync`/`npm run check`, never generated. Rules: keep it short (3-6 items), frame each by the PROBLEM it solves, never give an idea a dead repo/demo link (use `link` only for an issue/discussion). slug must be stable and must NOT collide with a live `portfolio` repo (sync warns when an idea has graduated). category -> taxonomy.categories; status -> taxonomy.roadmapStatus; horizon -> taxonomy.horizon. The two items below are SEED EXAMPLES — replace them with your real ideas.

items.title: Ride Weather Planner
items.problem: Planning a motorcycle ride means checking weather for the whole route over time, not a single city — no tool maps a forecast onto a multi-stage journey.
items.why: Scratches my own itch and extends the Moto Routes work into trip-time decisions.

items.title: Portfolio Metrics
items.problem: I have no single view of how my public projects perform (stars, traffic, referrers) over time — the data is scattered across GitHub insights pages.
items.why: A small data-engineering pipeline + dashboard that dogfoods this portfolio hub.
